px-3.reason: Blocks are page layout scope; use the 8px rhythm for horizontal spacing.

py-3.reason: Blocks are page layout scope; use the 8px rhythm for vertical spacing.

gap-3.reason: Blocks are page layout scope; use the 8px rhythm for gaps.

bg-red-500.reason: Use semantic UI8Kit color tokens instead of raw palette colors.

text-red-500.reason: Use semantic UI8Kit color tokens instead of raw palette colors.
